channel.title: HTML5 UP Dimension template for Frontity @matnard/dimension-theme
channel.description:
Hi, I'm sharing my first Frontity project here. I applied Frontity on a HTML5 up template and used react-transition-group to orchestrate the animations. It's a simple site but in my opinion it was a great way to get started with Frontity. I might do another one as it was pretty fun to make.
demo : https://dimension.matnard.now.sh/ npm i @matnard/dimension-theme https://github.com/Matnard/frontity-dimension-theme#readme

item.title: HTML5 UP Dimension template for Frontity @matnard/dimension-theme

item.description:
Gorgeous! Really nice work @Matnard!!

Read full topic

item.title: HTML5 UP Dimension template for Frontity @matnard/dimension-theme
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi @Matnard! Congrats on your first Frontity project! It looks really cool! And thanks for sharing!

Is it ok if we feature it in the Showcase page and the Frontity newsletter?

Read full topic
item.source: HTML5 UP Dimension template for Frontity @matnard/dimension-theme

item.title: HTML5 UP Dimension template for Frontity @matnard/dimension-theme
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
I love it @Matnard the combination of the animations with the pre-fetching works just great

Thanks for sharing your creation with the community!

Read full topic
item.source: HTML5 UP Dimension template for Frontity @matnard/dimension-theme

item.title: HTML5 UP Dimension template for Frontity @matnard/dimension-theme
item.dc:creator: Matnard
item.description:
Hi,
I’m sharing my first Frontity project here.
I applied Frontity on a HTML5 up template and used react-transition-group to orchestrate the animations.
It’s a simple site but in my opinion it was a great way to get started with Frontity.
I might do another one as it was pretty fun to make.

demo : https://dimension.matnard.now.sh/
npm i @matnard/dimension-theme
https://github.com/Matnard/frontity-dimension-theme#readme

Read full topic
item.source: HTML5 UP Dimension template for Frontity @matnard/dimension-theme
